name: Chuck Liddell
oneLiner: The classic light heavyweight star case: knockout aura, title defenses, Tito/Couture rivalry value, and a rough late-career ending.
compareShortCase: Chuck is the classic light heavyweight champion case: knockout aura, title defenses, Tito and Couture rivalries, and one of the defining star runs of the early modern UFC.
compareCounter: Chuck's argument is peak aura and era impact. The knock is that the resume is not as deep or clean as later light heavyweight and pound-for-pound cases.
